title: EasyPal Digital SSTV
short description:
Seen it on the Web-SDR Twente. It could be on any frequency. 
It's quite a short signal to contain a picture. 
Text (a callsign?) is visible in the waterfall sometimes at the end and sometimes at the beginning of the sound burst. In the audio file it is at the beginning.
The signal begins at 30 second mark.
Someone suggested it was Easypal made signal
